Description: Configuration options for Lottie animation playback and rendering.

PublicProperties.Name: AutoPlay
PublicProperties.Description:
Gets or sets whether the animation should start playing automatically.
Remarks: Default is true.

PublicProperties.Name: Direction
PublicProperties.Description:
Gets or sets the playback direction.
Remarks: 1 for forward, -1 for reverse. Default is 1.

PublicProperties.Name: EnterFrameEvent
PublicProperties.Description:
Whether to enable the enterFrame event.
Remarks: If CurrentFrameChangedFunc is null this should be false.

PublicProperties.Name: Loop
PublicProperties.Description:
Gets or sets the loop behavior for the animation.
Remarks: Can be true (infinite loop), false (no loop), or a positive integer for a specific number of loops.

PublicProperties.Name: Path
PublicProperties.Description:
The source or path to the lottie animation JSON file.
Remarks: This can be a URL or a local path relative to the web root. e.g. "./_content/Blazor.Lottie.Player/loading.json" or "https://example.com/path/to/animation.json".

PublicProperties.Name: Quality
PublicProperties.Description:
Gets or sets the rendering quality level.
Remarks: Default is High.

PublicProperties.Name: Renderer
PublicProperties.Description:
Gets or sets the type of Lottie animation to render.
Remarks: Default is SVG for best feature support.

PublicProperties.Name: SetSubFrame
PublicProperties.Description:
Gets or sets whether to enable smooth frame interpolation for high refresh rate displays.
Remarks: Default is true for smooth animations.

PublicProperties.Name: Speed
PublicProperties.Description:
Gets or sets the playback speed multiplier.
Remarks: 1.0 is normal speed, 2.0 is double speed, 0.5 is half speed. Default is 1.0.
